✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

Audio playback: One-line sound playback over AVAudioPlayer.

Audio session management: SoundCategory (AVAudioSession categories) is fenced to iOS/tvOS — a small, clean feature×platform gap.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of SwiftySound? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
